variants.text: Social Media Metrics That Matter: Prioritize metrics tied to your goal: reach diagnostics, engagement quality, and conversion proxies.

Social Media Metrics That Matter

Prioritize metrics tied to your goal: reach diagnostics, engagement quality, and conversion proxies. Vanity counts without context create false confidence — cite sources when quoting benchmarks.

Read the guide:

Social Media Metrics That Matter

Prioritize metrics tied to your goal: reach diagnostics, engagement quality, and conversion proxies. Vanity counts without context create false confidence — cite sources when quoting benchmarks.

Key takeaways:
• Goal-aligned KPIs beat generic dashboards
• Context matters more than a single number
• Never invent statistics
